headline: Merck & Co., Inc. Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Merck & Co., Inc. (NYSE:MRK) reported first-quarter 2026 revenue of $16.3 billion, up 5% year over year, as the company highlighted continued oncology momentum, growing contributions from newer launches, and a series of regulatory and pipeline milestones discussed on its quarterly sales and earn
